title: Pre-Race Activation
description: Prime legs and nervous system before competition
purpose: Prime legs and nervous system before competition

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 10 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10 minutes of Z2 work. 90-95 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25% done. 18 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 25% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 51% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 70%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 51% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 51% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 3 blocks left. 12 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/4. 64% complete. Hold 90% steady. 12 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 64% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 12 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/4. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 26 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 67% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 67% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2/4. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 2 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 16min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-90 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 28 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 28 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 72% complete. 100% for 1:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% done. 0 intervals left. 7 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 17min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 29 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/6. You're 80% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5: 120% FTP. You're 31 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 80% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 120% for 0:30. Then 2:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 81% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 81% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 81% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/6. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 150% × 10s. Then 5min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10s at 150%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 150% for 10s. Then 5min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 150% × 10s. Standing, 88-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 87% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 87% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 87% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
